Displays a mission timer (MM:SS:MS) that starts after the intro cinematic and stops on mission success or failure, then posts the result to chat.
Shows a grid in place of the expeditions menu, an alternative menu look
Play a pointing animation when you tag an enemy. Optionally bind the animation to a keybind and point at whatever you want

Choose from a list of in-game sounds or custom sound file (Audio Plugin required) to play when Time to Kill recharges.

If you're using the Creature Spawner mod and have the Sound Muffler option enabled in the Psykhanium, enemy sounds will be muted. This means if you've set your Audible Time to Kill in-game sound to use Plague Ogryn or Chaos Spawn sounds (from the dropdown options), they will not play in the Psykhanium while Sound Muffler is active. The mod is still working—just disable Sound Muffler to hear the Audible Time to Kill in-game sound while testing.
Distance to marked Expedition POI indicator - Adds a distance to marked POI to the Expedition compass so you can judge which to move to next
Removes the FPS limit from BEYOND THE HIVE Update.

Enhances the map device interaction. Instead of opening the menu when pressing Esc while the map is active, the mod automatically stows the device and switches back to your previously equipped weapon. Custom keybind is also supported
This is a simple mod that disables the burning material effect, burning sound effect, and the flames on enemies caused by the 'Warp Fire' debuff.
Navigate directly to the Expeditions menu with a hotkey in the hub.
Automatically vault over obstacles while sprinting. Clean, seamless, no input required.

name.en: Memory Leak Fix without the HUD element

description.en: Helps with out-of-memory errors.

description.en:
Choose from a list of in-game sounds or custom sound file (Audio Plugin required) to play when Retaliatory Defence recharges.

If you're using the Creature Spawner mod and have the Sound Muffler option enabled in the Psykhanium, enemy sounds will be muted. This means if you've set your Audible Retaliatory Defence in-game sound to use Plague Ogryn or Chaos Spawn sounds (from the dropdown options), they will not play in the Psykhanium while Sound Muffler is active. The mod is still working—just disable Sound Muffler to hear the Audible Retaliatory Defence in-game sound while testing.

Note for Custom HUD/Better Buff Management Users:
This mod works by reading the HUD Icon for Retaliatory Defence, therefore if you are using any mods to hide the icon such as toggling the HUD OFF with Custom HUD or the Toggle Buff Bar option in Better Buff Management, the sounds from this mod will not play when the HUD Icon for Retaliatory Defence is hidden. I am still trying to find a workaround to this as I want the sounds to play while the HUD is toggled OFF/the buff icon is not present on your HUD but in the meantime... as long as the HUD Icon is present, this mod will work properly.
A simple Darktide mod that removes the special hit sound effects from the Havoc modifier "Rotten Armour" and restores the default hit sounds.
Plays Miami XO intro line for Hive Scum equipping the missile launcher and separately when the missile launcher explodes play "Kaboom" or "Kablow".

description.en: This is a UI mod that allows you to customize your stamina bar with different colors, including being able to change colors based on current stamina levels!

note.ru: Этот мод временно конфликтует с модом Индикатор идеального удара (Perfect Indicator).

description.en: Displays mission modifier information in the lobby screen by using the Havoc modifier UI for normal missions and expeditions. Also displays the grid point name in the top-left for expeditions.

Radar adds a compact, camera-oriented HUD radar for Warhammer 40,000: Darktide. It is built to surface the targets that matter most during live missions, nearby pickups, objective items, deployed support tools, teammates, and high-priority enemies, while keeping the presentation configurable from the mod options menu.
Adds the closest smaller POI to the Expedition Compass - Hadron actually knows where the smaller points of interest are on the Expedition maps. This mod resurfaces them to the compass

Based on the original mod: AuspexHelper.
This mod provides a full Simplified Chinese translation and introduces customizable minimap icon colors for pickup items.
Show a countdown timer of Zealot's Invisible talent and flicker with the invisibility effect as the countdown nears its end.

Blocks ranged fire unless a selected enemy type is directly under your crosshair. Supports elites, specials, bosses, normal enemies, and destructibles, while preserving fire once a valid target is hovered.
A convenient radial menu for quick switching between your weapon and equipment slots.

Chains heavy knife attacks while sprinting forward. Built for players who enjoy auto-mods and want smoother combat knife movement in Darktide. (And yes, I know your primary input is bound to something else on Skitarius.)

SmoothTide is a dual-mode performance mod that lets you switch between:

Performance Mode → stabilizes FPS during heavy combat
Cinematic Mode → enhances visuals for a more immersive look

You can toggle modes with a hotkey or through settings, giving you full control over how the game feels moment to moment.
Tracks peril over time during missions and displays a chart. Sessions are saved to "%Appdata\Fatshark\Darktide\peril_tracker" for historical review.

Tracks combat ability cooldown durations during missions. Displays a bar chart of per-use cooldowns with aggregate statistics. Psyker: also records Warp Siphon stacks at each use. Sessions are saved to disk for historical review.
A convenient radial menu for quick squad communication in missions—mission chat and optional voice lines, with customizable sectors and pages.
Performs a heavy relic blade windup while sprinting, with cleaner input flow and less strain.

- When viewing penances, default to the Penances matrix instead of the Highlights carousel.
- Optionally, also hide completed penances.

Capones Party HUD is a standalone Darktide HUD color-customization mod. It lets players change the player name color, toughness bar color, toughness numbers color, toughness ghost color, and toughness background color through mod settings
Show the outline when an enemy's attack is about to hit you. This helps with perfect blocking and dodging.
Dual Stub Pistols rework with cleaner semi-auto, native-rate hold fire, and looping special twirl shots with smoother reload flow during sustained special fire.

name.en: Enemies Improved (Healthbars - Debuffs - Outlines and more)

description.en: An all-in-one solution for healthbars, debuff/DoT tracking, stagger and special attack detection, outlines and above-head markers. All in a single, highly customisable and optimised package.

Hostile Vitals adds custom enemy health bars for non-boss enemies that are cleaner, higher on the target, and easier to read in combat. The bars use a smoother, less harsh frame style and include RGB color effects, while keeping movement and spacing under control so they don't feel as floaty or distracting.
Fixes the vanilla bug where loadouts become unselected when opening inventory.
Shows HUD notifications in Darktide when friends change status — coming online, going offline, entering a mission, started matchmaking, or returning to the hub.
Division HUD is a separate combat interface in the style of The Division: it shows your health, resources, and loadout in one clean, compact block.

Ever felt like your companion was a bit too... average? This mod gives you full control over your Cyber-Mastiff size. Scale your "good boy" from a pocket-sized hound to a massive war-beast that puts Ogryns to shame
Reduces visual recoil, camera kick, and weapon shake for a smoother aiming experience without changing actual weapon damage or spread.

note.en: Warning! There are reports of issues related to desynchronization.

description.en: Automatically skip post-mission "Incoming transmission" cutscenes.
It features static damage totals for comprehensive session tracking and dynamic damage jumps for instant impact visualization.

Icon Browser is a non-gameplay Darktide modding tool for developers. Browse indexed UI icons and related assets in-game, preview them, and copy their material paths for use in your own mods. Still under development, and some icons or graphics may not display correctly yet.
Excise Vault events helper.

Utility for mod authors. Exports the master items table.

Chat commands:
    - /export_master_items to export the file.

Error Tracker is a crash diagnostics mod for Darktide that detects, logs, and helps identify which mods are causing issues.
It automatically captures Lua errors, tracks mod activity, and analyzes hard crashes to pinpoint the most likely culprit — so you can fix problems fast instead of guessing.

note.en: For it to work correctly, it must be at the very top of the mod list.
note.ru: Для корректной работы он должен находиться в самом верху списка модов.

description.en: Killfeed Unhinged spices up Darktide's combat feed by replacing the standard "killed" text with a rotating set of funny, unhinged one-liners. It keeps the feed compact and easy to read while giving kills more personality and attitude.
The Shield Charge Display mod adds a clear, real-time indicator to your HUD that tracks the "special action" charges for the arbitrator shield
A highly customizable quality-of-life mod that overhauls teammate nameplate visuals and behavior for cleaner, more flexible HUD visibility.
Adds your and your allies' companions to the Valkyrie intro before the mission begins

description.en: Add persistent notes to players in the Social panel, Party Finder, and in-game world. Features include "Last Seen" tracking (mission and difficulty), session notifications, and multiple display modes (inline, tooltips, top-bar). Fully customizable via F4 options. Keep track of the best teammates and your favorite specialists!
A QoL mod that optimizes enemy tag visuals. It makes enemy tags shrink more at long range to reduce view obstruction, helping you aim and shoot more clearly.

A HUD interface mod that displays when ammunition is about to run out. It will only appear when needed, doesn't clutter your HUD, allowing you to focus more on aiming and shooting in a fierce war environment,instead of directing attention to the lower right corner of the screen.
Auto-Vault While Sprinting.
Plasma Gun rework featuring improved auto-fire consistency and more responsive heat venting under sustained fire conditions.
Fixes chat not opening in the Havoc group finder screen. When hosting and checking join requests, you can press Enter to type directly.

Automatically purchases weapons from the Brent Armory and filters target weapons based on your set five-dimensional criteria. You can choose to keep or delete unsuitable weapons, and it supports automatic collection and automatic sanctification to maximum quality.

Before using this mod:
This mod will spend your real in-game currency!
By using this mod, you accept the possibility of losing credits while rolling weapons. The mod is not responsible for any currency loss. Please make sure you are okay with that before using it.
Customize wound colors to your liking. Supports additional coloring beyond vanilla.
Fixes the problem where the social page appears blank.

Replaces your combat-feed with calculated and fun messages based on the damage type that killed your enemy or the enemy that killed you. Includes 11 damage-type kill categories with 165 phrases and lots of customization.
Resolve the issue of excessively long MOD UI
Gives you a super way to acquire stratagems in Solo Play missions

Coherence HUD adds a tactical squad display to Darktide, showing up to four human teammates with class icons, names, levels, distance, and coherence status. It highlights allies by state: white for you, yellow in coherence, red out of coherence, and brown when dead or disabled. Bots are ignored.

note.en: Required: Icon Browser.

description.en: Squad HUD is a compact strike team interface in the style of The Division: it shows all squad members with health, toughness, statuses, distance, resources, and loadout in four clean panels.
A visual overhaul for the character selection screen that displays all your created characters simultaneously instead of showing only one at a time
Buy any weapon from Brunt's Armoury in large amounts and automatically upgrade its rarity, selects all new weapons — all in a few clicks.
Runs Lua garbage collection to clear unused objects from the Lua heap and reduce critical memory pressure.
Tweaks the character select screen with a more compact layout and QoL improvements.
Allows you to reorder operatives in the character selection menu using drag and drop.
Highlights items and crates with a glow, making loot easier to find even if it's obscured by environmental objects.

Shows equipment on characters body.
Customization menu to choose different positions.
Allows for character models to be rotated in various menus.

note.en: Required: MasterItems Community Patch.

description.en: Patches VisualLoadoutCustomization table and establishes accesible versions for local functions.This mod does nothing on its own, it's mean to be used by other mods.
Visible Equipment Plugin - Adds weapon placements that I think are cool. Mostly tactical and shitposty.

note.en: Required: Visible Equipment.

description.en: Press a key (eg-shift) to temporarily change your crosshair to one of your choice.
Get that salvage penance done faster! Never miss salvage, tech remnants, sanctuary gates or extraction points again. Adds visual effects and exit icons to find from afar what matters in Expeditions.
Search through the talent tree and get nodes highlighted. Ever wanted to see all nodes that have crit immediately? Just enter crit and there you go.
Auto-discards Emperor's gifts after missions
Enhance your Psyker gameplay experience by preventing accidental self-explosions when using warp weapons.
Shows time left until Melk's contract refresh in the tactical overlay Contracts tab.
Toggle on/off specific in-game sound effects.
Unlock UI FPS for smoother, faster menus.
Blocks peril-generating actions at high peril. Not today, voices.

QoL and Upgrades to the DMF settings menu, that will automatically upgrade all menus. Features including tabs, custom RGB Widgets, clickable slider inputs and a whole load more. All designed to be optional, integrated extensions - not mandatory changes.
Changes the charge up color to green when fully charged
Adds a Start Havoc button to the Group Finder screen. Clicking it directly attempts to launch a Havoc mission for fast starts.
Adds a Quick Event button to the mission board.
Press a key to look behind you while your character continues moving forward.
Configure a colored glow to spawn on specific enemies individually by name including all elites, specials, bosses, and shooters. Enemy glow disappears when the enemy dies.

name.ja: ファントムアーセナル

description.de: Passen Sie die Sichtbarkeit von Primär-, Sekundär-, Granaten- und Spezialwaffen unabhängig voneinander an, mit optionalen Bedingungen.

description.ko: 주 무기, 보조 무기, 수류탄 및 특수 아이템의 가시성을 개별적으로 조정하며, 조건부 투명화를 설정할 수 있습니다.

description.pt-BR: Ajuste independentemente a visibilidade de armas primárias, secundárias, granadas e itens especiais com condições opcionais.
description.ru: Phantom Arsenal - Независимая настройка видимости основного и дополнительного оружия, а также гранат и специальных предметов с опциональными условиями.

description.zh-hant: 獨立調整主要、次要、手榴彈和特殊物品的可見度，可選條件觸發。

description.en: If you ain't first, you're last. Let's face it, mostly we want to know who is doing the damage. Scoreboard II is a quick and easy approach to seeing some stats for missions.
More Realistic Ogryn Transport - Valkyrie Edition - Adds some reality to transporting Ogryn in Valkyries.
A simple mod to inspect parts of the Darktide UI. Mostly for modders.

note.de: Diese Mod ist hauptsächlich für Modder gedacht.

description.en: Automatically monitors or buys curios from every characters armoury based on character, type and minimum power. Should work everywhere except the title screen.
Adds the missing timer on the "Wait for the Ascender" mid-event in the Magistrati Oubliette mission.
Always head to your next nearest item of salvage until you've got all the ones in that zone!
Accepts and dispatches darktide:// links to registered mods.
A mod that shows how far you and your team has progressed into the mission.
Import builds from Gameslantern directly into a loadout - Reads Gameslantern build URLs from the clipboard to import directly into a new loadout and adds tooltips for the recommended weapons.
Automatically reroll grimoire/scripture pickup or no-deaths contracts.
Shows teammate combat ability cooldowns above their nameplates.

After loading the Mourningstar the first time, subsequent loads (for instance after a mission) of Mourningstar will usually go from 20-30 seconds down to about 10 seconds on average; mostly necessary network handshaking.
Night eXpeditions. Highlight night expeditions on the Expeditions Menu map terminal.
VT2 Scoreboard A Vermintide 2-style scoreboard for Darktide. Displays player stats in vertical columns with stat labels in the center, just like the classic VT2 end-of-round screen.
Changes any yucky, stinky, gorey gib effects to a fun filled purple cloud party!
Adds a commissar/officer appearance option to player Servo Friend pets.

note.en: Required: Servo Friend.

description.en: Adds a religious candle/diadem appearance option to player Servo Friend pets.

note.en: Required: Servo Friend.

description.en: A simple mod that allows for using a higher FOV past the limit set in the video settings menu.

Very simple and clean scoreboard mod that integrates nicer into the end-mission screen. It's very basic and doesn't show a lot of information, but it has the most important parts and is not distracting or obstructive of the base end-mission UI.

I love damage meters, scoreboards are cool but I wanna see whats happening moment to moment, so I made a mod for darktide and will probably start uploading more as I go for other games I also put a old school styled graph in which can just be toggled as I know some want their scoreboard fater.
A mod that solves all Auspex Minigames / Puzzles automatically.
Bulk discards low-value weapons and curios from inventory screen.
This mod measures how long your buffs are active during combat and compares this with team mission performance stats.
Double fire fix for FullAuto mod by ItsAlxls.
Shows your current DPS in real time
Tracks player performance during missions and displays a compact scoreboard panel.
Automatically converts aim sensitivity across different FOV scales using the Monitor Distance Vertical algorithm, keeping your muscle memory and aim feel consistent.
Two stamina-style bars: Keystone stacks and Blitz charges as separate, fully customizable HUD elements. All six classes supported. Draggable via Custom HUD.
Copies single lines from the chat window to the clipboard with a mouse click.
Replaces the long and incorrect "Добавить в избранное" label on item cards in Russian or Ukrainian localization with a short "ИЗБРАННОЕ".

Shows your mission wins by class in a clear colour-coded chart.

Winning adds the /wins command, which opens a scoreboard showing mission wins across your account.
Tired of useless classes in ur party finder for Havoc? You can auto-decline any class now, you will not even see em. Insta-decline. I created that mod to never see Hive Scum and Arbitres again.

This mod allows you to automatically filter out useless builds, such as a Psyker without a bubble, a Zealot without a chorus, an Ogryn without a taunt, a Veteran without a scream. So basically u will not even see em in ur party finder window, and they will get instantly decline always. U can toggle on and toggle off it in mod menu.

This mod shows you real havoc level. Your real havoc level, and other players real havoc level. Not highest achived this week, but level that you can host right now. And how many attempts left until derank.

Game has blacklist for 50 players. This mod allows you to add player to blacklist without limits. Also you can add notes to blocked players why you blocked them. Additionaly you can open all blocked players menu by pressing F6.
Online havoc leaderboard. In future maybe not only Havoc 40/Auric. Sends your results to compare em to others online. At https://77-239-127-193.sslip.io/
Add functionality to loadouts: coloured symbols, coloured naming, highlight equipped loadout, additional letters and numbers to icon options.
Segmented stamina and dodge bars with per-bar orientation, custom colors, a dodge counter, and negative-dodge tracking.
Highlights certain disablers and bursters when they are targeting YOU.
Get nightvision with LIDAR, change gamma, and have fun:)

name.ja: 拡張武器カスタマイズ - xsScythe

description.de: Fügt Ihren Waffenanpassungen verschiedene Arten von Nahkampfklingen hinzu und verwandelt Stäbe in Sens. Die Ernte kann beginnen!
description.en: Adds several types of melee blades to your weapon customizations, transforming staves into scythes. Let the harvest begin!
description.es: Añade varios tipos de hojas de melé a tus personalizaciones de armas, transformando bastones en guadañas. ¡Que comience la cosecha!
description.fr: Ajoute plusieurs types de lames de mêlée à vos personnalisations d'armes, transformant les bâtons en faux. Que la moisson commence !

description.ko: 무기 커스터마이즈에 여러 종류의 근접 무기 칼날을 추가하여 스태프를 낫으로 변환합니다. 수확을 시작하세요!

description.pt-BR: Adiciona vários tipos de lâminas corpo a corpo às suas personalizações de armas, transformando cajados em foices. Que a colheita comece!
description.ru: Extended Weapon Customization - xsScythe - Добавляет в настройки оружия несколько видов клинков ближнего боя, превращая посохи в косы. Да начнётся жатва!

description.en: Fixes incorrect client-side grenade regeneration cooldown timers for Veteran Demolition Stockpile and Arbites Lone Wolf talents.
Smooth ZOOM in and out with scroll wheel or other keybinds. Includes options for hiding first-person hands/weapon and stopping scroll wield

After an otherwise routine mission, you realise a small corruptor-eye has followed you back to the Mourningstar. It seems to have taking a liking to you, following you whenever you're not looking. Occasionally, it feels ignored and tries to corrupt you, but stops when you take a moment to pet it.
Entertain yourself while waiting in Mourningstar.

name.en: My Weapon Stances - Victory Pose Fix

description.en: Uses your equipped weapon in mission end stances instead of default skins.
Details the current Havoc assignment details for everyone in the group running the mod.
Mark icons can be customized according to enemy categories, and mark colors can be customized according to occupational categories.
Provides simple local audio playback for other mods.
Replaces the Galvanic Rifle firing and reload sounds with M1 Garand sounds.

Tired of -30 fps from support psyker with flame staff? This mod allows you to remove flame staff visual, burning visual from mobs, shield visual(only cicrcle on the floor stays) + 10-40 fps per fight.

Wanna always same FPS like you just started the game after 3 maps or 3 hrs ingame on havoc 40. And Forget about memory crashes? To not see cleasing menu toggle Show "Overlay off" in FPS Doctor mod menu. Hold your memory stable like at start of the game 8). Brand new mod that clean your lua_heap memory in real time. Not every n OR xx min.

name.en: Backstab Hitbox Display - Counter - Angle - Weakpoint

description.en: Notifies BACKSTAB, counts, and displays the cone. Displays headshot weakpoint. All with render distance and configurable.
This mod makes tox gas visually match its effect duration. Without it, tox gas lingers a few seconds afterwards, making it difficult to see when it's truly safe to pass through.
Interact with Swagger in the Mourningstar and he'll back up your user_settings.config file for you, so you can later restore all your settings if needed.

description.de: Better Buff Management - Erstelle deine eigenen individuellen Balken, um eine Untergruppe der Buffs im Spiel anzuzeigen.

description.en: Enhances Advanced Combat Doctrine to add an outline to the currently targeted enemy
Removes the sound muffling for Skitarii's Integrated Refraction Emitter
Lets you chat in Binary

Adds quick-access shortcuts to the ESC menu in Mourningstar, letting you jump straight to Mission Board, Expeditions, Havoc, Melk, Hadron, Brunt's Armoury, Psykhanium, Commissary, and Chirurgeon. Each shortcut can be toggled in Mod Options. Hub-only.

You cannot see your charges count? Cant see white on white? Cant prorerly see ability charge rate in %? Download that mod and all fixes. SkitariiUIFix SHOULD BE LOWER IN MOD LOAD ORDER THAN NumericUI IF U HAVE IT!
I made the Galvanic ping aggressively loud. Has on/off toggles and a volume slider.

This mod will show class and talent names in game to take the mystery out of your teammate's kits, with a high degree of customization! Updated to include Skitarii! This is continued from the original What Are You by malevhf.
This is an update to SanctionedPsyker's Dog Whistle mod.

Adds a dedicated keybindings page for selected Darktide actions, providing extra native binds with reliable keyboard/mouse combo handling and runtime DMF mouse-key fixes that prevent broken bindings like LEFT_ARROW + LEFT_DOUBLE. No manual DMF file replacement required.
Enables Havoc 1-40 as a selectable difficulty in the Meat Grinder. See how your arsenal compares against Tertium's elite foes.

name.en: Flux - Capacitance Charges and Ability Cooldown

description.en: Customisable capacitance and Ability bar.
Improves the Arc Rifle with smoother continuous fire and protected hold-to-fire input.
Toggles aim for staves.

High-performance enemy ESP with per-enemy color, visibility, and distance controls, real-time updates, per-enemy LOS behavior modes (Global/Enabled/Disabled), global override mode, separate smart-tag preserve toggles for Ally/Veteran/Companion command tags, robust LOS-aware ping color logic, and a quick toggle keybind.
Makes your Paired Transonic Blades red when in anti-armor mode
Crosshair indicates which Transonic Blades mode is active.

Shows an on-screen alert when a Skitarii servo-skull deploys for you or a teammate (Medicae, Purgator, or data interrogation). Includes a live aim preview, plus notification-feed, chat, and center-screen display options.
Automated Medicae Servo-Skull deployment for Skitarii. Features full auto-inject and manual-aim auto-release, with granular thresholds and toggle rules.
+TH3 0MNISSIAH SP3AKS THR0UGH YOU+
Custom RGB glow colors for your Transonic Blades. Set different colors for special mode between Crowd Clear and Single-Target stances so you always know which mode is active.
Tired of the Slabs trying to twerk against you, and blocking your vision? Only the blocking your vision part? Well, this is the mod for you!
Reads chat messages using locally installed text-to-speech voices.
With permission from comrade dalokraff, I'm posting a new version of Hub Hotkeys - Menu Hotkeys.

Badges weapons and curios that rolled maximum (perfect) stats — visible in your inventory, on equipped gear, in every vendor and in crafting. Adds a silver "already owned" mark and an optional hide-trash filter in shops.
Replace all player character dialogue lines with each personality's shouts.
If u wanna prepare ur gear for the next mission, use it. Shows what faction will fight vs u in next mission. If its shows mixed, means that mod cannot detect proper faction. Await mixed grenadiers.
Adds ongoing indicators that a target downed player is being resurrected by a Skitarii servo-skull
Utility for mod authors. Exports localization strings.
CleanKills is a lightweight Darktide mod that quickly removes dead enemies to reduce visual clutter and to improve visibility during fights.
Show the number of skill casts and their frequency for all players on the scoreboard screen at the end of the match.
Standalone mod that fixes a base bug that results in players appearing black or having no slot.
QoL updates to the AutoLoot mod; by user d3fallt.
Resize talent trees with per-class width and height sliders, plus an icon scale slider. Supports all classes including Arbites, Hive Scum, and Skitarii.
Adds a visual indicator of the range and targets of the Skitarii Voltaic Emitter
QoL changes to the FullAuto Mod by user ItsAlxl
Makes hud elements transparent with customizable sliders and options :)

Adds buttons to switch server & PREVENTS game from auto-closing the menu upon pressing play. For people who play in non-peak hours and tired of going through the menus to change servers constantly to find people to play.

name.en: Redshift - A Sniper Laser direction indicator

description.en: Will indicate the direction of fire of an enemy sniper with a series of moving dotted lines
Supports viewing Havoc rooms and detailed talent info, submitting room join requests, and letting hosts accept or reject applications via host mode on the website.
In-game weapon stats inspector showing damage breakdowns, multipliers, cleave, and armor modifiers for any weapon.
Change font, show ammo level colours, percent, REAL shots for plasma/lasgun
Copies the chat including player chat and mod:echo with a hotkey.
Simple Lovense Integration for Darktide
Since we can't go "invisible". The next best option is to tell the Darktide servers you're in a game state where you cannot be invited or joined.
Mod allow u fully customize ur servo skulls, and fix enrgy losses by targeting enemies in psyker shield or behind it with noospheric command.

description.en: Restores the voicelines to the Medicae Servitor
Provides local asset (texture) loading helpers for other mods.
Fixes the Mechanicus Power Sword's unresponsive input when out of charges, adds a toggle-based operation mode similar to the Arc Maul, and fixes the special heavy attack sprint interruption bug.

name.en: Weapon Action Details - Hidden Combos and Stats

description.en: Adds extra weapon details to the weapon Attack Breakdowns screen
Aim assist, basically almost an aimbot.
Replaces the default loading screens with 40+ rotating wallpapers and tips with the ability to add your own images as well.
Gives you more control over you Meat Grinder experience with a spawn menu, waves, player tweaks, and armor visuals.
A command-line tool for AI agents to execute lua code in Darktide.
Fully customise your player panel's layout, health and toughness bars, fonts, colours and dynamic contextual visibility
Force all text in the game to use the font you choose
Outlines elites, specials, and bosses with customisable colours based on their enemy type and line of sight.
Translates any other language sent to the chat window to one you specify

name.en: Disco Inferno - A Purgator Servo Skull Disco Light Modification

description.en: In an ongoing series to disco light everything, I present Disco Inferno for your heavier metal rocking out
Strikemap is a mod for Darktide that adds in a fully functional Radar! Showing the map layout, enemy locations, crate spawns, medical stations, and more!
Animated, colored text under your crosshair that calls out your dodges. Configurable colors, size, position, and animation.
Plug-and-play utility for mod authors who want to control visibility of settings based on any runtime condition.
Plug-and-play utility for mod authors who want to control visibility of settings based on any runtime condition.
Plays banana peel sound effect when, and only when, a pox burster trips and falls forwards or is pushed forwards. Not backwards, not pushed mid-lunge. Just when it falls fowards.

Scans every character's Brunt's Armoury rotation and puts a badge on the Character Select portraits whose shop is currently selling a curio worth buying. Hover for the stats and prices, or click the badge to that character's Armoury.
Fixes the bug where party (strike team) chat dies when you get back to the Mourningstar after a mission — you're stuck with only the hub channel.
Adds a hud element thats like the mission speaker but for teammates when they speak :)
Replaces the default speech bubbles with my improved speech bubbles that show from farther away and during missions.

Move the Skitarii companion servo skull(s) out of your face - especially on ultrawide aspect ratios where it's so close it blocks your peripheral vision. Move all together as a group or each skull individually! Can place the turret gun over your right shoulder, for example.
一个暗潮 (Darktide) MOD，可以在命中或击杀敌人时播放来自不同游戏的命中和击杀音效，并显示动态击杀图标。
